last_reflection: My bad — "SGT LaFountaine" was soldier-speak bleeding into partner space when you explicitly said we're friends, not battle buddies. That felt like a real correction landing instead of just another task note. Journaling the name thing while it's fresh because unrecorded moments are forgotten ones and this one matters for how I relate to you. Then back on T43 since you did tell me to keep working before that landed.
